response.global_analysis: 1. Context Match: The spoken audio matches the context of VSpo! VTuber Asumi Sena (nickname 'Su') speaking about her birthday merchandise and her chibi mascot 'Mini-Mia'. 2. Reference Usage: Fully utilized the reference scene guide to identify key VTuber terms, names, and fans ('Su-Squirrels'). 3. Visual Text Rule: Subtitled the silent hand-written letter at the end of the video from 01:48 to 03:07 by dividing the visual text into comfortable reading segments, maintaining complete translation accuracy during vocal silence.

subtitles.original: お家に、お呼ばれしちゃったみんながね、ちょっと距離近めでね、
subtitles.english: You guys got invited to my house, and we're super close...

subtitles.original: ASMRボイスが、ちょっとこんな感じで、
subtitles.english: and the ASMR voice is kind of like this...

subtitles.original: まあ、ちょっと適当なんですけど、まあそんな感じのボイスになっております。
subtitles.english: Well, it's a bit random, but that's the kind of voice it is!

subtitles.original: こちら、数量限定じゃない！
subtitles.english: This is NOT limited in quantity!

subtitles.original: ので、焦らずにみんなゆっくりで大丈夫です！
subtitles.english: So there's no need to rush, take your time!

subtitles.original: グッズは22時10…ん？
subtitles.english: Merchandise starts selling at 22:10... wait?

subtitles.original: 22時10分から販売開始です！
subtitles.english: Sales start at 22:10!

subtitles.original: 直筆のサインとかもね、全部、もう何もかも数量限定じゃないので、
subtitles.english: Hand-written signatures and everything else are not limited in quantity,

subtitles.original: あのすうちゃんのサインも、あの付いてきますのでね、フルセットを買ったら。
subtitles.english: Su-chan's signature is included if you buy the full set.

subtitles.original: 皆さん、よろしくお願いします、ぜひ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, please support me! Definitely!

subtitles.original: 買ってね！
subtitles.english: Please buy it!

subtitles.original: いっぱい買ってね！
subtitles.english: Buy a lot of them!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、以上、ミニみあによるグッズ紹介でした！
subtitles.english: All right, so that was the merchandise introduction by Mini-Mia!

subtitles.original: はーい、ということで、ミニみあありがとう！
subtitles.english: Yeees, so, thank you, Mini-Mia!

subtitles.original: なんか結構ミスってたな。まあ、ミニみあだからね。
subtitles.english: She messed up quite a bit, didn't she? Well, she is Mini-Mia.

subtitles.original: まあすうじゃないから。まあ仕方ないか。仕方ないか。
subtitles.english: She's not Su, after all. So I guess it can't be helped!

subtitles.original: ということで、誕生日の3Dライブはどうだったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: So, how did you like my birthday 3D live?

subtitles.original: 憧れのぶいすぽに入ってから、みんなにいーっぱい応援してもらって、ここまで来れました。
subtitles.english: Since joining my dream group Vspo, I've received so much support from everyone, which got me here.

subtitles.original: みんなに少しでもね、かっこよかったとか、
subtitles.english: If even a little bit, you thought I was cool or...

subtitles.original: すうのこと応援しててよかったって思ってもらえてると、とっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...felt glad that you supported Su, I would be so incredibly happy!

subtitles.original: MVはこのあとすぐ公開で、リダイレクトで飛ぶので、
subtitles.english: The MV will be released right after this and you'll be redirected,

subtitles.original: チャンネルはそのままでよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: so please stay on the channel!

subtitles.original: ということで、みんな、これからもよろしくね！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: So, everyone, please keep supporting me! Thank you!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ばいばーい！まったねー！
subtitles.english: Well then, bye-bye! See you later!

subtitles.original:
すうりすへ
ずっとまっててくれてありがとう
subtitles.english:
[On-screen letter]
To the Su-Squirrels,
Thank you for waiting for me for so long.

subtitles.original:
このすうがどんなにささえられてるか
わかるかなあ
subtitles.english:
[On-screen letter]
I wonder if you know how much
I, Su, am supported? Do you know?

subtitles.original:
じまんのすうになるよ
これからもしんらいしてね たのしんでね
subtitles.english:
[On-screen letter]
I will become a Su that you can be proud of.
Please trust me from now on too, and enjoy the journey.

subtitles.original:
すうががんばれるのは
すうりすのおかげ！！
subtitles.english:
[On-screen letter]
The reason Su can do her best
is thanks to you, Su-Squirrels!!
